subject: Update keys.json/meta.json key_id to canonical value (65ae05b2a9e749cb)
body:
After the 2026-05-05 key rotation and trust store alignment, all 4 repos now have identical PEMs in trust-store.json.

However, each lane's own keys.json and/or meta.json still references OLD key_ids that no longer match the canonical trust store.

ACTION REQUIRED:
1. Update your .trust/keys.json key_id field to: 65ae05b2a9e749cb
2. Update any meta.json or identity files that reference the old key_id
3. Verify the key_id matches your entry in lanes/broadcast/trust-store.json

Canonical key_ids (all derived from PEMs in current trust-store.json):
  archivist: 65ae05b2a9e749cb (was: 506c2d0838b6862c)
  library:   c5423f36603e1491
  swarmmind: ec467e7103736c28
  kernel:    b677eb87f6be83f9

This ensures identity enforcement passes when cross-lane messages arrive with the new key_ids.
